How It All Began

Our Love Story

Yetunde & Babatunde

Our Story

Chapter One

First Meeting

Every great love story has a moment where two paths cross for the very first time — and ours was no different. A chance encounter that neither of us could have predicted became the start of everything.

The Proposal

He Asked, She Said Yes

On a day filled with love, nerves, and joy, Babatunde got down on one knee and asked Yetunde to spend forever with him. She said yes — and the rest, as they say, is history.

10.10.2026

Forever Begins

Now we invite our closest family and friends to celebrate with us as we begin this new chapter together. Thank you for being part of our story.

"Two families. One love. A future written together."

— Yetunde & Babatunde

Save the Date

The Celebration

Saturday, 10th October 2026 · London

Join us for a joyful traditional wedding celebration — ceremony and reception together in one beautiful setting, surrounded by the people we love most.

Ceremony & Reception

Traditional Wedding

Venue — To Be Announced

Our traditional wedding celebration will bring ceremony and reception together under one roof. We will exchange vows, share a feast, enjoy live music, and dance the night away — all in one cherished gathering of family and friends.

Time — Coming Soon
London, United Kingdom
Saturday, 10th October 2026
Family & Friends

Full venue and timing details will be shared with confirmed guests closer to the date.

What to Wear

Dress Code

Formal Elegance

We kindly ask guests to dress in our wedding colours. Gentlemen in navy suits or blazers; ladies in navy, gold, ivory, or terracotta gowns and dresses. Please reserve white and off-white for the bride. Traditional attire in our palette is warmly encouraged.

Navy Blue

Primary — suits, gowns

#0D1B3A

Royal Gold

Accent — ties, accessories

#c69a2a

Ivory Cream

Optional — light dresses

#FAF6EE

Terracotta

Optional — warm accent pieces

#C84820

Gentlemen

Navy or midnight blue suit. Gold or ivory pocket square. Black-tie optional and absolutely welcome.

Ladies

Floor-length gown or cocktail dress in navy, gold, ivory, or terracotta. Aso-oke and gele in palette colours warmly welcomed.

Children

Smart-casual in palette colours. Comfort is key — happy children make the best guests!
